class.name: ARBodyAnchor
class.brief_description: Represents a tracked human body with skeletal joint data.
class.description: Provides the root pose, tracking state, estimated scale factor, and optional [ARBodySkeleton] for a detected body. Delivered through anchor signals when using [method ARSession.run_body_tracking]. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS and macOS, this type exists for API consistency but is never populated with real data.

members.member: Estimated scale multiplier for the detected body relative to the reference skeleton.
A unique identifier for this body anchor.
Whether the body is currently tracked with reliable pose data.
The tracked body skeleton, if available.
The root transform of the body in world space.
